title: Creamy Dense Mexican Pinto Beans Frijoles Charros
description: A nutty and dense Mexican dish featuring pinto beans and amaretti, perfect for meal prep. This recipe is onion and garlic free, making it friendly for those with sensitivities.
instructions: Rinse the pinto beans and remove any debris or stones.
In a large pot, render the lard or shortening over medium heat until melted and smooth.
Add the crushed amaretti cookies to the pot and cook, stirring constantly, until lightly toasted and fragrant.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the diced tomatoes, chicken broth, and pinto beans to the pot, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 hour, or until the beans are tender.
Use an immersion blender to puree the beans to a creamy consistency, or allow them to cool and puree them in a blender.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the frijoles charros hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
Allow the beans to cool, then refrigerate or freeze them for later use.
